summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ariadne Editorial Studio backend APIs and frontend functionality. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend has authentication session persistence issues affecting page navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: JWT token not persisting between page navigations, causing users to be redirected to login page
Shows 'Nessun profilo configurato' instead of displaying 5 seeded profiles from backend

integration_issues.issue: Authentication state not properly maintained across different pages

passed_tests: Backend JWT authentication with admin@ariadne.training / admin123
All backend API endpoints returning correct status codes and data
Social profiles API returns 5 seeded profiles correctly
Courses API returns 2 seeded courses with clone functionality
Planning rules API returns 2 seeded rules
Dashboard stats API returns all expected metrics
Repository categories and files endpoints work
Frontend login page loads correctly with Italian UI
Dashboard page loads with stats cards and calendar
Direct URL navigation to all pages (/profiles, /courses, /editorial, /rules, /workflow, /approvals, /export, /repository) works when authenticated
Courses page displays seeded data correctly

high_priority: Fix authentication session persistence - JWT tokens are not being maintained between page navigations
Investigate why social profiles are not loading on frontend despite backend API working correctly
medium_priority: Ensure all frontend pages properly fetch and display data from working backend APIs
Test and fix any potential CORS or authentication header issues in frontend API calls
